programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.sub-title: The Power of Good: Ian Warren
programme.desc: Thinking that you need to be great, before you start to do good is a misguided mindset. When people engage in doing good as a business mindset, it leads to success, including better financial outcomes.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's sudden engagement to a missionary, he embarks on a quest to keep her closer to home.

programme.title: Miracle Matt
programme.desc: Miracle Matt is the story of Matt Manzari. It is not only an account of how he survived 2 near death accidents, but this inspirational documentary takes a look into how he wears his scars.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Hindrance to Hearing God's Voice
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In The Power of God's Promises Part 1, Pastor Bayless shares his deeply personal testimony of survival after a traumatic boating accident that nearly took his life.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Should You Treat Your Enemies? - Part 2
programme.desc: How hard is it to pray for your enemies? Today, learn about spiritual warfare as you discover the liberating power of being a blessing to those who have hurt you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's sudden engagement to a missionary, he embarks on a quest to keep her closer to home.

programme.title: What's Your Everest?
programme.desc: An inspiring expedition documentary following Bjorn Brickell of Life FM, Sue Van Schreven of Orphans Aid International and a team of supporters, as they climb to one of the worlds most renowned trekking destinations.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: Matt's passion transforms his bread from bland to brilliant. But when his bread loses its magic, the island locals turn to Annie, Matt's childhood friend - and true love - for help.

programme.title: Travis: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On April 10, 2012, life for the Mills family dramatically changed forever. A routine patrol in Afghanistan turned into the fight of SSG Travis Mills's life when he was hit by an IED and lost portions of both arms and legs.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The One Thing That Brings Success In Every Area Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness always seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.sub-title: When Autumn Leaves Begin to Fall
programme.desc: Allie and Oliver discover a threat. Rosemary invites the kids to debate Lucas on the radio. Bill interrogates a suspect with an old friend's help. Elizabeth fights a cold.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.sub-title: Ps Scott Thornton - Letters To The Church. Wk6
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Healing the Wounds of Rejection - Part 1
programme.desc: Rejection is something nearly everyone has dealt with at some point in life. Joyce and Ginger discuss this very important subject as well as ways to heal and move forward with peace and purpose.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's sudden engagement to a missionary, he embarks on a quest to keep her closer to home.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, laughs, adventures and of course, silly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God who loves them.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: After years of struggle, John Wesley embraces saving grace, but his new message is not welcome in the churches. Will John break all the rules and take his message outside the church walls to the needy and outcast?

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the New Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: The Coles Story: From Corner Store to Supermarket Giant
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: The Lost Tiger
programme.desc: Adopted by a wrestler kangaroo family, Teo's life changes when visions guide him to his roots. He sets off on an epic journey to save his homeland from destruction.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Richard the Stork and the Mystery of ...
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: Santa's brother Fred, who has lost belief in Christmas, discovers that a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: The plump black-and-white bear, Po, is back in his biggest adventure yet.

programme.sub-title: Choose Life For You And Your Children

programme.title: The Christian View

programme.title: At the Table
programme.sub-title: Dad's Mental Health, Tips for New Mums, Good Habits for Parents and Kids!
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. You'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In The Power of God's Promises Part 1, Pastor Bayless shares his deeply personal testimony of survival after a traumatic boating accident that nearly took his life.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: God is still working miracles. Trust Him, believe Him, and watch His power at work in your life.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Healing the Wounds of Rejection - Part 2
programme.desc: What rejection have you faced in your life that still hurts? Discover how to heal and find your worth in God's love through honest, hope-filled truths shared by Joyce, Ginger, and Erin.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How to Get the Most out of Your Work/ The Believer_s Highest Honour
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Adventures of Dally & Spanky
programme.desc: A girl inherits a miniature horse that develops an unlikely friendship with her half-sister's Jack Russell Terrier, which takes to riding on the horse's back.

programme.title: The White Cathedral

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Lighting Up The Shadow of Doubt
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy phrases crazy challenges, random things you can do in 3 minutes to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything

programme.sub-title: The One Thing That Brings Success In Every Area Pt 3 of 4

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Healing the Wounds of Rejection - Part 2
programme.desc: What rejection have you faced in your life that still hurts? Discover how to heal and find your worth in God's love through honest, hope-filled truths shared by Joyce, Ginger, and Erin.

programme.title: A Marriage Made in Heaven
programme.desc: It appears Demetri Chicopoulos is living a charmed life, but he has lost his mother and recently gone through a divorce. In a prayerful moment Demetri asks God if he could just relive one week of his life.

programme.title: Will Faith Do Us Part?
programme.desc: Will Faith Do Us Part? reveals the intimate stories of three Christian couples who are dealing with the challenges of being united with a spouse who is no less devoted to Jesus, yet has different beliefs and faith practices from their own.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How to Get the Most out of Your Work/ The Believer_s Highest Honour
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.sub-title: Building a New Testament Church Pt1a
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Never too Late to Celebrate
programme.desc: Career-focused dentist Camila is reluctant to celebrate her 30th birthday but inspired by Javi, a Spanish teacher, the two plan a 'quinceanera' themed party to honour her Hispanic heritage.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The One Thing That Brings Success In Every Area Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: In this inspirational message, Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches about "Hope". He shares on why we should have hope and what happens when we have hope and trust in the Lord.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: In business you will need to be engaged with others to build success. Whether it's suppliers, logistics, accountants, consultants, lawyers or something else, there will be times that you need help from others.

programme.title: Towards Belief
programme.desc: Australian pastor and host, Karl Faase travels to the UK, USA and Australia to interview more than thirty leading authors, speakers and apologists as they seek to defuse the top belief blockers to the Christian faith.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: You can't have View & Chew without a good food truck. Then the views get big and historic when Allie and Regina check the South Street Seaport Museum.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: Choose Life For You And Your Children
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: Why Don_t My Prayers Get Answered?
programme.desc: Many of us have wondered why God hasn't answered our prayers, but within Scripture we find seven reasons why our prayers may be going unanswered.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Chasing Your Future by Confronting Your Past - Part 1
programme.desc: Sometimes following God means confronting a problem you'd rather forget. Joyce shares her testimony and stories from God's Word to encourage you.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Hindrance to Hearing God's Voice
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Drive Thru History

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Social institutions, such as hospitals and universities, had their genesis in the Christian Church and were motivated by Jesus' radical example of caring for those in need and teaching everyone, not just wealthy males.

programme.title: Everyone: Amsterdam 23
programme.desc: This 3 day conference held in the Netherlands in 2023 was packed with many great speakers around the world. All with one heart and mission to reach EVERYONE worldwide with Christ.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV

programme.title: Connect

programme.title: TV One Life

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: God is still working miracles. Trust Him, believe Him, and watch His power at work in your life.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.sub-title: Chasing Your Future by Confronting Your Past - Part 1

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Hindrance to Hearing God's Voice
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: In this inspirational message, Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches about "Hope". He shares on why we should have hope and what happens when we have hope and trust in the Lord.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In The Power of God's Promises Part 1, Pastor Bayless shares his deeply personal testimony of survival after a traumatic boating accident that nearly took his life.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The One Thing That Brings Success In Every Area Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Junior Asparagus and Laura Carrot start spreading rumors, which spread over Bumblyburg like a weed. Larry-Boy arrives and convinces them that God doesn't want us to tell stories that hurt people.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt5
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people but to bring them into a life-giving relationship.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying and renovations, camp life, fishing, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni and Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Try some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Jared Cooke's story depicts how his past addiction led him down a dark path. His redemption and recovery from these learned and highly reinforcing behaviours can be overcome with a willingness to do the work and accepting help.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Chasing Your Future by Confronting Your Past - Part 2
programme.desc: Is there anything God has been asking you to do? Learn to overcome any fears or emotional discouragements that have kept you from making progress.

programme.sub-title: Ps Scott Thornton - Letters To The Church. Wk6
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Owlegories

programme.title: Megamind

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas

programme.title: The Flintstones

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Storks
